title: Array within object not updating in workflow
symptom: When attempting to partially update an array within an object in a no-code workflow, the array remains empty despite following the expected steps.
applies_when: Trying to update an array within an object
root_cause: The issue arises from using an incorrect path when attempting to bind the array for the update. The path must be relative to the selected variable, and using an absolute path can lead to the update not being recognized.
fix_steps: Open the workflow where the update is being made
agent_instruction: Ensure the path for the array update is relative to the selected variable.
